---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---

### Get the list of S&P 500 stocks


```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(tidyquant)

companies <- tq_index("SP500")
companies <- companies |>
  filter(symbol != "-")
companies |> write_tsv("data/sp500_list_2026-04-03.tsv")

companies |>
  slice_head(n = 3)
```



### Get their prices


```{r}
library(duckdb)

conn <- dbConnect(duckdb(), dbdir = "data/sp500_prices_2026-04-03.duckdb", read_only = FALSE)

df_prices <- companies |>
  # slice_sample(n = 5) |>
  select(symbol) |>
  tq_get(get = "stock.prices", from = "2023-01-01")

dbWriteTable(conn = conn, "prices", df_prices)

res <- dbGetQuery(conn = conn, "FROM prices LIMIT 3")

res

# df_prices |> write_tsv("data/sp500_prices_2026-04-01.tsv")
```
